creator: pauamma@gundo.com
text:
(In reply to Muhammad Moinur Rahman from comment #2)

I was coming here to suggest textproc/vale for the styleguide side of igor too. That said, I'd recommend being very careful in both implementing and explaining the style rules, as misguided stylecheckers can be very wrong and misleading to writers not alert to how English works, as demonstrated by not reliably telling passive voice from active voice.
